title: gl1282
description: A mod which stops the OpenGL error id 1282 from logging into the Minecraft logs.
body: GL-1282 mod is a mod that suppresses the OpenGL error id-1282. This is quite helpful since this error spams the log with the message many times a second which can slow down the game and your computer. This mod is currently 1.18.2 and will be updated in future.
